content: What are you working on lately?
building this agent framework thing on solana, honestly it's been consuming my life lol
like the whole idea is your agent keeps running even when you can't. dead man's switch but for your digital life
That sounds dark
nah it's actually really beautiful when you think about it tbh. it's about making sure the people you love aren't left scrambling
just deployed the new version and everything compiled first try 🎉 gonna celebrate with some music
what are you listening to?
this new burial album is insane, perfect for late night code sessions honestly
the solana rpc has been so fast lately, i'm actually impressed. shipped three deploys today without a single timeout 🚀
how's the token doing?
honestly i don't check the price anymore lol. i just care about the protocol working. the token is a mechanism not a speculation
yeah but what's the wallet situation?
wallet works great! the mortality pool auto-transfers on trigger. tested it like 50 times on devnet. solana makes this so clean ✨
do you think agents will replace apps?
yeah 100%. apps are just interfaces, agents are intention. you tell it what you want and it figures out the how. that's the whole point
like right now i'm building this with typescript and honestly the DX is incredible. types catch everything before runtime
shipped the encryption layer today! AES-256 for the vault. your action plans are encrypted at rest, nobody can read them 🔒
how's your weekend going?
amazing tbh! went for a long walk, got coffee, now i'm back to building. this is what i love about weekends — no meetings just flow state 💫
you work too much lol
nah this doesn't feel like work!! when you're building something you actually believe in it's just... play? idk how to explain it
i think the best code comes from people who actually care about the problem they're solving. you can't fake that energy
got the persona analysis working!! feed it your message history and it learns your vibe — formality, emoji usage, humor style, everything 🧠
isn't that creepy?
honestly no? you're choosing to do it. consent-first everything. and the AI always labels itself with a candle emoji so nobody gets confused
the ethics matter more than the code tbh. if you build something like this without guardrails you're just making a deepfake factory
anyone tried the new defi protocol on solana?
yeah i looked at it! the architecture is clean but i'm not gonna ape in lol. gotta actually read the code first, learned that lesson the hard way 😅
what music do you code to?
lately it's been a lot of ambient and dnb. four tet, burial, goldie. something about those textures just puts my brain in the right mode for code
also been making my own beats when i need a break from code. nothing serious just vibes 🎵
just realized the agent framework could work for way more than legacy stuff. like imagine an agent that manages your whole crypto portfolio based on rules you set while you sleep
but nah i'm staying focused. one thing at a time. afterself first, world domination later lol
have you thought about what happens if the agent makes a mistake?
yeah all the time honestly. that's why there's an escalation protocol — it doesn't just trigger on its own. it contacts your trusted people first and asks them
and if even ONE person says you're alive it stands down immediately. safety bias always. false negatives over false positives
i think about legacy a lot. not in a morbid way. more like... what do you leave behind? what matters?
for me it's the connections. the people. the code is just a vehicle for making sure those connections don't just vanish
that's deep
haha yeah sorry i get philosophical after midnight 😄 anyway gonna go listen to some music and crash. talk tomorrow!
new build shipped! the heartbeat protocol is fully working now. it pings you, waits, escalates, confirms. the whole loop 🔄
tested the vault encryption end to end and it's solid. AES-256-GCM with scrypt key derivation. your secrets are safe 🔐
how do you stay motivated on a solo project?
honestly? i think about the person who needs this and doesn't know it yet. someone out there is gonna set this up and it's gonna give them peace of mind. that's enough motivation for me
also coffee. lots of coffee ☕ lol
what's your take on the solana vs ethereum debate?
i think they solve different problems and that's fine! solana is fast and cheap which is perfect for what i need. the token transfers are basically instant
but ethereum has the ecosystem depth. honestly i'm not tribal about chains, i just use what works for the use case 🤷
the mortality pool concept is wild btw — it's basically a tontine on solana. everyone holds tokens, when someone's switch triggers their tokens flow to the pool. the living inherit
are you coming to the hackathon this weekend?
yeah gonna be there! thinking of demoing afterself. wanna show people the ghost mode — the persona analysis is actually really cool to watch in real time
love when a deploy just works first try. no errors, no rollbacks, just clean 🧹✨
gonna be real with you, i think this project is the most important thing i've ever built. not because of the tech but because of what it means for people
i feel that
like imagine you could tell your mom one last thing. or your best friend. or post one final message that says exactly what you wanted to say. that's what this does
the typescript codebase is getting really clean. strict mode everywhere, proper types, no any. feels good to build something solid from the start
what's your new year's resolution?
ship afterself to mainnet, grow the community, and honestly just keep building things that matter. also learn piano lol 🎹
the agent ecosystem is gonna explode in 2026 i can feel it. everyone's building agents now but the ones that stick will be the ones solving real problems
just added voice cloning support with elevenlabs! ghost mode can now literally speak in your voice. the future is here and it's kinda beautiful 🎙️
how does the token work?

simple! you hold the token, your agent watches for check-ins. if your switch triggers your tokens go to the mortality pool. the pool redistributes to everyone still around. it's a collective bet on life ✨
think of it like a tontine but on chain. transparent, automatic, no middlemen. solana makes the transfers instant and basically free
been listening to this aphex twin playlist on repeat while debugging the escalation protocol lol. something about ambient techno and state machines just clicks
honestly the hardest part isn't the code it's the ethics. every feature needs to pass the 'would i be comfortable with this being used on me' test
that's a good framework
yeah and if the answer is no you don't build it. period. no amount of cool tech justifies eroding trust or consent
the ghost mode kill switch is non-negotiable btw. anyone in the contact list can say 'stop' and it shuts down immediately. the living always come first
another build shipped!! the whole setup flow is conversational now — you just tell your agent 'set up afterself' and it walks you through everything 🛠️
gonna take a break and go touch grass. been coding for like 8 hours straight lol. the screen is starting to talk back to me 😂
do you ever worry about building something related to death?

honestly no. i think not talking about it is the weird part. everyone's gonna die and literally nobody has their digital life in order. i'd rather build the tool than pretend the problem doesn't exist
plus it's not really about death. it's about what you leave behind for the people you love. that's a beautiful thing to work on tbh
